title: Undead Armies
description: A mod focused on adding cooperation between entities to accomplish a specific target, inspired by strategies in real world armies.
body:
# THIS MOD IS BEING REWRITTEN
- This mod is currently being rewritten, it's recommended to wait for the rewrite to be finished.
- The rewrite should be done before ~~february~~ ~~march~~ ~~may~~ june 2026.
- As for the progress, Stacking & Mining is done, currently working on ramming (will be renamed to ram & trample).

Have you ever felt the undead mobs in minecraft were lacking intelligence? This mod fixes that! 

this mod enables undead mobs to work together to destroy a player or any other entity [such as iron golems]. Undead mobs can also do other things that help them destroy their targets.

# Features list
>### Stacking
>Undead mobs will climb on top of eachother to go through obstacles
>### Mining
>Undead mobs will mine their way in to their target
>### Sprinting
>Undead mobs will sprint to their target if their target is near.
>### Grab
>Undead mobs will grab their target if able to, inflicting slowness on their target and themselves.
>### Jumping
>Undead mobs can jump 2 block gaps
>### Multi targeting
>Groups of Undead mobs are now able to split into smaller groups to attack multiple targets at once
>### Ramming 
>A Group of Undead mobs can violently leap and crash into a block causing it to break if enough damage was done.
  
# Compatibility
- Practically compatible with any mod. [this mod only adds on existing minecraft code]
  
# Note
- This mod does not store any extra data! Therefore, if a mob was breaking a block and the server restarts, the progress of breaking that block will be reset!

# Find this mod on Curseforge
- Click [this](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/undead-armies)
